pages.text:
MINISTRY OF EDUCATION

Janish Research Administratior

HOLMENS KANAL:

DK- 1060 COPENHAGEN I

TELEFAX +45 1 32 35 01

TELEX 15652 FS

YOUR REE.

OUR. REF: 40-201 BSM/A.Holm

DATE 24 November 1988

To whom it may concern

ower of authority to sign Annex 1 to the Convention, statutes of the uropean Synchrotron Radiation Facility is hereby given to professor, ar. phil. E. Præstgaard, Chairman of Statens naturvidenskabelige Forsk- lingsråd, Denmark

Palisa tam

P. Olesen Larsen

Director
